'''Lammax''' was a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Danju system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], near a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] that made travel to the planet dangerous. [[Port Bianco/Legends|Port Bianco]] was established on Lammax by [[Lamuu Bianco]] during the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a place for his [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ships to dock between tourist seasons. It was at its height during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Former [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] pirate [[Shanto Dhil]] served as [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of Port Bianco.
